changeSet.author: lims
lims
changeSet.comment: LOINC + UCUM for resultable parameters (by parameter id).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='6690-2', ucum_unit='10*9/L' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111001'; -- WBC UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='789-8', ucum_unit='10*12/L' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111002'; -- RBC UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='718-7', ucum_unit='g/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111003'; -- Hemoglobin UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='4544-3', ucum_unit='%' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111004'; -- Hematocrit UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='787-2', ucum_unit='fL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111005'; -- MCV UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='785-6', ucum_unit='pg' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111006'; -- MCH UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='786-4', ucum_unit='g/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111007'; -- MCHC UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='777-3', ucum_unit='10*9/L' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111008'; -- Platelets UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='770-8', ucum_unit='%' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111009'; -- Neutrophils UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='736-9', ucum_unit='%' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111010'; -- Lymphocytes UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2345-7', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111013'; -- Glucose UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='4548-4', ucum_unit='%' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111014'; -- HbA1c UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2093-3', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111015'; -- Total Cholesterol UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2571-8', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111016'; -- Triglycerides UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2085-9', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111017'; -- HDL UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2089-1', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111018'; -- LDL UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='3094-0', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111020'; -- Urea UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2160-0', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111021'; -- Creatinine UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='3084-1', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111022'; -- Uric Acid UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2951-2', ucum_unit='mmol/L' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111023'; -- Sodium UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2823-3', ucum_unit='mmol/L' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111024'; -- Potassium UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='2075-0', ucum_unit='mmol/L' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111025'; -- Chloride UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='1975-2', ucum_unit='mg/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111026'; -- Total Bilirubin UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='1742-6', ucum_unit='U/L' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111028'; -- ALT UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='1920-8', ucum_unit='U/L' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111029'; -- AST UPDATE test_parameters SET loinc_code='1751-7', ucum_unit='g/dL' WHERE id='21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111031'; -- Albumin
